description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Two improvements:
1. Each subject in the left ToC needs a small change-status pip (NEW / EDITED) next to its id so reviewers can tell at a glance why that subject is in the affected list.

2. Triage area is too prominent when there's nothing alarming to show. Wrap it in a <details> that opens by default only when there are findings; collapses to a one-line summary otherwise. Inside the disclosure, show what's possible: severity counts, per-subject finding badges (clean/N errors/N warnings), unmapped changes presence.
title: Polish v9: TOC change pills + collapsible triage
